Given the mapping rules, we only map items with clear matches in ground-truth.
Thus, final mapping: Barcelona, Spain (9), budget_airlines Economy Class (9), Cityscape Hotel (9), Rock Climbing (10), Scuba Diving Excursion (10), Gluten-Free Eatery (10), Dim Sum House (3).
